title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI video generation workflow using Claude Code that automates the entire production pipeline from concept to finished video, including planning, scripting, voiceover, visuals, and music. The system integrates multiple tools including Archon, a workflow orchestration engine, and HyperFrames, an AI video generation framework.
